headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall On U.S. Peace Plan To Iran; 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: Futures rose and oil prices fell as the U.S. reportedly sent a peace plan to Iran. President Trump said Tehran is "talking sense."

headline: These Dow Jones Stocks Make Bullish Moves; Retailer Dumps OpenAI
summary: Dow Jones stocks Walmart and Caterpillar are acting relatively well amid a weak stock market, as both show new buy points.  Walmart climbed 1.3% Tuesday afternoon as it hit resistance at the 50-day moving average.  Investors could use the March 17 high of 127.19 as an entry, but market risk is quite high for any stock purchases.

headline: How Caterpillar is navigating Mideast uncertainties amid Iran war
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) Group President of Power & Energy Jason Kaiser tells Yahoo Finance’s Julie Hyman the company is prioritizing safety in Middle East-based construction projects while seeing rising demand for on-site power from data centers as energy needs grow.

headline: Caterpillar Taps Energy And AI Power Deals As Valuation Questions Linger
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) has entered a global framework agreement with Atlas Energy Solutions covering about 1.4 gigawatts of power generation assets. The company is securing additional orders tied to the build out of AI data centers worldwide. Recent contracts come as energy security, grid reliability, and automation attract more capital across multiple regions. For investors following NYSE:CAT, the latest power generation agreement with Atlas Energy Solutions marks an extension of...

headline: Greenbrier, Acuity Brands, Werner, Kennametal, and Scorpio Tankers Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Trump administration postponed military action against Iran's following 'very good and productive' talks. The Dow Jones Industrial Average responded with a significant jump as the news sent a wave of optimism through trading floors.
